description: Locate 'Zealand Falls Hut' and 'Guyot Shelter' within the 'White Mountains POIs' database. Create a new list named 'SAR Mission' containing both waypoints and a route connecting 'Zealand Falls Hut' to 'Guyot Shelter'. Export the 'SAR Mission' list as a GPX file to C:\workspace\output\sar_mission.gpx.

metadata.data_source: White Mountain National Forest AMC Huts and Shelters (Real Spatial Data)
